tracks.meaning: a vertical arrangement of cells in a spreadsheet or database table containing related data
a vertical structural support or pillar, typically cylindrical, that bears weight in a building
a vertical section of text on a printed page, especially in a newspaper or magazine layout
a tall natural formation of rock rising steeply from the ground or sea
the vertebral column or spine, the series of bones extending from the skull to the pelvis
a formation of soldiers, vehicles, or ships arranged in a line for movement
a regular newspaper or magazine article written by the same author on a specific topic
a vertical section of financial data in an accounting statement or report
